title: Indulgent Argentinian Beef Stew
description: A rich, umami-packed stew infused with juniper berries and wrapped in ti leaf for a pillowy, monsoon-inspired experience.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a pot until shimmering.
Add beef cubes and sear until browned on all sides.
Sauté diced onion in the same pot until translucent, then add minced garlic and cook for 30 seconds.
Stir in tomato paste, tomato sauce, beef broth, crushed juniper berries, oregano, and bay leaf; bring to a simmer.
Return beef to the pot, season with salt and pepper, and simmer for 45 minutes until tender.
Lay a ti leaf sheet over a clean surface, place a portion of the stew onto the leaf, fold the edges over to create a pouch, and seal with a small piece of twine.
Arrange the ti leaf-wrapped portions in a pot of boiling water, cover, and simmer for an additional 15 minutes.
Serve directly from the ti leaf, garnish with fresh parsley, and enjoy.
